name: I Masanielli
teaser: About a half hour out of Naples, Francesco Martucci makes a much more robust and complex version of a Neapolitan pie.
review: About a half hour out of Naples, Francesco Martucci makes a much more robust and complex version of a Neapolitan pie. Insane ingredients and so many textural and flavorful tweaks to the dough make this place unskippable if you're in Campania.
headsUp: Francesco Martucci is one of the most exciting pizza chefs working today.
update: Worth a dedicated trip to Caserta if you are a pizza pilgrim.
